description_long: This is a large, horizontally-oriented cylindrical storage tank mounted on a rectangular concrete platform. The tank is supported by a robust metal frame and features several visible pipe connections and control units, likely for monitoring and regulating the contents. On one side, there is a complex assembly of valves, gauges, and possibly pumps, indicating its use for storing and dispensing liquids or gases. The tank has a smooth, white exterior with a small access hatch or vent on the top and additional fittings along the sides. The base structure is dark-colored, contrasting with the tank's body, and the entire unit appears industrial and purpose-built. The setup suggests it is designed for secure, high-capacity storage in an urban or industrial environment.
description: A large, white, horizontal cylindrical storage tank on a concrete base with visible pipes, valves, and control units. The tank is industrial in appearance and features a robust metal support frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cylindrical tank, its supporting frame, and attached control units on the left.
description_view_1: End view displaying the circular face of the tank and the supporting frame beneath, with minimal visible attachments.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting additional pipework and fittings attached to the tank, as well as the main body and support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the complex assembly of valves, gauges, and control units, with the tank's end face and top hatch visible.
